user.title: Seneye — Choose Backend
user.description: Select how Home Assistant should read data from your Seneye device.

mqtt.title: Seneye — MQTT Backend
mqtt.description:
Enter the topic prefix configured in your `seneye_mqtt_publisher`. The integration will subscribe to `<prefix>/state` and `<prefix>/status`.

Make sure the **MQTT integration** is configured in Home Assistant and connected to the same broker as your publisher.

error.mqtt_not_configured: The MQTT integration is not configured or not connected in Home Assistant. Set it up first under Settings → Devices & Services → MQTT.

init.title: Seneye Options
init.description: Adjust calibration offsets and (for HID) the polling interval.
